data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a default endpoint per channel and owner.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for a default endpoint per channel and owner. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific records or details about the existence or functionality of these endpoints, which are crucial for confirming the requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for these records but does not provide concrete evidence of their existence or functionality, leading to an inconclusive validation.
gaps: No evidence of default endpoint per channel and owner provided.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and functionality of default endpoints per channel and owner.
